prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为13858→14950→17039→18663→22009，连续5年持续后移，累计后移约8151名；近3年每年后移幅度约2000–3300名，2025年基准位 次约22009名，后移趋势明显；本省物理类计划2021年196人、2022年260人、2023年198人、2024年287人、2025年292人；2026年计划增至312人，较2025 年扩招20人（+6.85%），扩招幅度较大，理论上可缓解部分竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名中东北大学（校本部）2026年主 榜第38名，近年排名稳定在第36–39名区间，学校层次高、综合实力强；2026年高考周期内东北大学声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及校区争议（秦皇岛分校在校 名中直接使用"校区"二字以消除与本部隔离感），无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第82位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中等水平；未见投档线异常或断档记录；共享东北大学学科评估结果：控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、冶金工程A、机械工程A-、材料科学与工程A-、软件工程A-，共6个A类学科，在理工类高校中优势 突出，对物理类考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在2026年高考周期内持续高热推荐，与该校物理类招生专业 高度匹配；本省物理类考生2025年约363040人，2026年估算约364844人（按总609800人×近年物理类占比59.8%），基本持平略增，竞争压力变化不大；该校位于河北省秦皇岛市，属于本省招生，对本省考生有天然地域便利性；学校所在地与考生同省，无跨省报 考的额外顾虑。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移的强劲趋势、2026年扩招6.85%的缓解作用、本省考生总数基本持平、学校声誉中性无负面冲击、优势学科对物理类考生 的持续吸引力，考虑到扩招幅度较大但位次后移惯性更强，给予小幅修正后预测最低位次约22864名，区间22364–23364名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 13858 → 14950 → 17039 → 18663 → 22009, continuously shifting backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative shift of approximately 8151 places; in the past 3 years, the annual shift was about 2000–3300 places, with a baseline ranking of approximately 22009 in 2025, showing a clear backward trend; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 196 in 2021, 260 in 2022, 198 in 2023, 287 in 2024, and 292 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 312, an expansion of 20 places (+6.85%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and could theoretically alleviate some competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, Northeastern University (main campus) ranked 38th on the main list, with recent rankings stable in the 36–39 range, indicating a high school level and strong comprehensive strength; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Northeastern University's reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus controversy (Qinhuangdao Campus directly uses the word 'campus' in its name to eliminate the sense of separation from the main campus), with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity total ranking is 82nd, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a medium level; no abnormal admission scores or gaps have been recorded; shares the discipline evaluation results of Northeastern University: Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Metallurgical Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, Software Engineering A-, totaling 6 A-level disciplines, which are prominent advantages among science and engineering universities and strongly attract Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc., continue to be highly recommended during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, highly matching the Physics Category enrollment majors of this university; the number of Physics Category candidates in this province was approximately 363,040 in 2025, and estimated to be about 364,844 in 2026 (based on total 609,800 × recent Physics Category proportion of 59.8%), basically flat with a slight increase, with little change in competitive pressure; the university is located in Qinhuangdao City, Hebei Province, which is within the province, providing natural regional convenience for local candidates; the school location is in the same province as the candidates, with no additional concerns about cross-province applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of continuous backward shift in historical rankings, the mitigating effect of a 6.85% expansion in 2026, the basically flat total number of candidates in the province, the neutral reputation with no negative impact, and the sustained attractiveness of advantageous disciplines to Physics Category candidates, and taking into account the relatively large expansion but stronger inertia of the backward shift, a minor correction is applied to predict a minimum ranking of approximately 22864, with a range of 22364–23364.

- Communication Engineering.

- Additive Manufacturing Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 22864, range 22364–23364. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 22364 focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Automation; candidates near 22864 should prioritize Tier 2 majors like Mechanical, Instrumentation, and Mathematics; candidates near 23364 should use Tier 3 majors such as Materials, Business Administration, and Economics as safety options, while also paying attention to new majors like Additive Manufacturing Engineering. The university's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in Control, Computer, Mechanical, and Materials fields, so when applying, prioritize majors with high relevance to A-level disciplines.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 2313 → 2445 → 3109 → 2882 → 3215, showing an overall backward trend with significant fluctuations; in 2024, it rebounded to 2882, but in 2025, it moved back to 3215, with a cumulative backward shift of about 333 places in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3215. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 28 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 32 in 2023, 32 in 2024, and 32 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 38, an expansion of 6 students (+18.75%) compared to 2025, which is significant and theoretically can markedly alleviate competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, Northeastern University (main campus) ranks 38th overall. The high school level also attracts History Category candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with average Douyin popularity and no major negative public opinion. History Category has few majors (only 4), so overall application attention is relatively limited. It shares the discipline evaluation results of Northeastern University, but the History Category majors (Economics, Business Administration, Foreign Languages and Literature, Ethnology) have low correlation with the university's A-class engineering advantages, making disciplinary appeal relatively limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2025, there were approximately 243,714 History Category candidates in the province; in 2026, it is estimated to be about 244,956 (based on total 609,800 × recent History Category proportion of 40.2%), essentially flat with a slight increase. The university is located in Qinhuangdao City, Hebei Province, and recruits within the province, offering regional convenience for local History Category candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation and backward trend, the significant alleviation effect of the 18.75% enrollment expansion in 2026, the basically flat total number of provincial candidates, neutral school reputation, and low correlation between History Category majors and advantageous disciplines, and taking into account that the large expansion may attract more applicants but History Category majors have average popularity, a minor correction yields a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 3547, with a range of 3047–4047.
